# minio_account_info (Data Source)

Returns storage usage and bucket information for the authenticated account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_account_info" "current" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `account_name` (String) Name of the authenticated account.
- `bucket_count` (Number) Total number of buckets accessible to this account.
- `buckets` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--buckets))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `total_objects` (String) Total object count across all buckets.
- `total_size` (String) Total storage used across all buckets (bytes).

<a id="nestedatt--buckets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `buckets`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
- `objects` (String)
- `size` (String)
